offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, abnormal usage causes excessive costs. We monitor utility bills and flag abnormal usage instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem: excessive utility costs due to abnormal usage
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
Direct message 20-50 property managers with a demo
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try dashboard for monitoring utility trends and manual entry option for utility bills on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
